indicators.name: QQQ vs MA200
indicators.desc: Price below 200-day MA signals long-term trend breakdown

indicators.name: QQQ vs MA50
indicators.desc: Price below 50-day MA signals medium-term weakness

indicators.name: VIX Level
indicators.desc: Fear gauge — elevated VIX = risk-off sentiment

indicators.name: HY Spread
indicators.desc: High-yield credit spread — widening = credit stress

indicators.name: SPY/QQQ Breadth
indicators.desc: SPY 20d return minus QQQ 20d return — divergence = narrow market

indicators.name: 5d ROC
indicators.desc: 5-day rate of change — acute selling velocity

methodology.event_detection: Score crosses Level 2 (≥50); merge events within 60 calendar days
methodology.backtest_logic: Sell QQQ when score ≥ 50; re-enter when score ≤ 29; hold cash between
